title: cymbopogon strictus
intro: Cymbopogon strictus, also known as East Indian lemon grass, is a tropical grass native to Southeast Asia. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like citral and geraniol, that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon strictus include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of fever and cold. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or internally for therapeutic purposes.
